input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.5.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.5.6
            TITLE: spacing must be clearly defined. components and cables capable of movement must be

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.5.6: Spacing must be clearly defined. Components and cables capable of movement must be
EV.6.5.6 Spacing must be clearly defined. Components and cables capable of movement must be 
positively restrained to maintain spacing.

final_answer: Spacing must be clearly defined. Components and cables capable of movement must be positively restrained to maintain spacing.
